name: Iter15 — Toast notification appears and auto-dismisses
description: Verify a success toast notification appears in the bottom-right after a review is saved and auto-dismisses within 5 seconds.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/OWASP/NodeGoat/pull/300 in the PR URL input field
Wait up to 90 seconds for the review to complete
A toast notification appears in the bottom-right corner of the page containing a success message such as 'Review saved successfully'
The toast notification has auto-dismissed and is no longer visible on the page
